name: Linguine with Roasted Garlic & Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 dozen little neck clams, scrubbed clean
12 ounces fresh linguine, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 4 cloves of garlic on a square of foil and drizzle with about 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
2. Roast in a 400-degree oven for 20 minutes or until the garlic is tender.
3. Peel the roasted garlic and coarsely chop it.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pot.
5. Stir in the chopped garlic.
6. Add the red pepper flakes and chopped parsley to the pot.
7. Pour in the white wine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
8. Add the cooked clams and cover the pot.
9. Cook for about 8 minutes or until all the clams are open.
10. Discard any unopened clams.
11. Stir in the linguine and toss to coat evenly.
12. Serve immediately.
Yield: 2 servings
